title: cacosmia rugosa var. rugosa
intro: Cacosmia rugosa var. rugosa, also known as the "Yellowroot" or "Columbo", is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, and has been used to treat a variety of health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cacosmia rugosa var. rugosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
